reviews.review_msg: Very nice guy and easygoing. Very organized. However, if multiple choice exams aren't your thing, stay away from this course. The prof is funny...but the material is UNBELIEVABLY BORING.

Very nice guy and easygoing. Very organized. However, if multiple choice exams aren't your thing, stay away from this course. The prof is funny...but the material is UNBELIEVABLY BORING.

I took the class that Barbara taught at UFV.  She was a lot of fun to learn from, and was always friendly and in a good mood.  She was quick to respond to my emails, and helped me answer any of my questions.  She brought cookies and treats to every class, and the discussions that she generated were meaningful and interesting.
